title: PIM Monitor generic webhook payload v1
description: Schema for the JSON payload PIM Monitor POSTs to URLs that do not match Teams/Slack/Discord. Versioned via the `schemaVersion` field (semver). Consumers should validate against this schema to catch upstream changes.

$schema.description: Pointer to this JSON Schema (optional self-reference for validators).

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the payload contract. Major bumps are breaking; minor adds optional fields; patch is wording/docs only.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this notification was built.

commitSha.description: Git SHA of the inventory commit produced by this scan (omitted when no commit was made).

classification.description: Count of access-model Coverage findings (unclassified roles/groups).

changes.description: All git + compliance changes at or above scan.minSeverity. Truncated to 50 items; overflow signalled by a `{ _truncated, remaining }` placeholder as the final element.

changeType.description: added | modified | removed | created | deleted | rule_added | rule_removed | policy_added | policy_removed | new_property | removed_property

fileType.description: git | tier-compliance | group-compliance | auth-context-policy-compliance | (or any other classifier emitted by diff.ps1)

context.description: Role / group display name when applicable.

roleId.description: Entra ID role definition GUID when the change concerns a role.

groupId.description: Entra ID group object GUID when the change concerns a PIM group.

coverage.description: Access-model coverage findings (roles/groups not classified in any AccessModel/*.json). Truncated to 50 items.

urls.description: External links produced by the scan. All fields are optional; absent when the CI platform cannot be detected or REPORT_ARTIFACT is disabled.

diff.description: Commit diff in the source repo (GitHub commit page or Azure DevOps commit page).

report.description: Pipeline run / artifact page where the HTML scan report lives.

_legacy.description: DEPRECATED in v1.0.0, will be REMOVED in v2.0.0. Mirrors the pre-formalization payload fields so existing consumers that read `payload.text` / `payload.summary` / `payload.changesBySeverity` can migrate by switching to `payload._legacy.*`, then to the v1 top-level equivalents.
